judge_thought: Explanation: The question asks if any entries are not "from some place," which refers to having an origin such as nationality or school/club team. In the table, every player has a nationality listed (United States) and a school/club team listed (e.g., Tennessee, California State–Long Beach, Georgia, etc.). While many entries lack a position, all have a place of origin. Therefore, there are no entries missing a place.
